A Servant can be Desynchronized when cut.message: A Servant can be Desynchronized when cut off from The Synchronous' massive distributed network architecture. Some that are describe the experience of being Synchronized as one where purpose and directive are always clearly defined--something often comforting to commanders in this dark age, but antithetical to others that seek to be something greater than themselves.

A neural network thought to have origina.message: A neural network thought to have originally been used to train new commanders, it has continued its training cycles while they slumbered and is now the deadliest force in the galaxy.

Additional amount of time in seconds bef.message: Additional amount of time in seconds before recognising that it is contained.

Additional system depth before the AI re.message: Additional system depth before the AI receives tech buffs.

Adds a Sub Commander that will join you.message: Adds a Sub Commander that will join you in battles.

Adds a low powered laser to the Firefly..message: Adds a low powered laser to the Firefly.

Adds a low powered laser to the Skitter..message: Adds a low powered laser to the Skitter.

Advanced Manufacturing - This modified v.message: Advanced Manufacturing - This modified version of the Advanced Metal Extractor can be placed anywhere, but costs more and produces at a decreased rate. Cannot stack with the basic Metal Extractor. Produces metal.

Air Ammunition Tech increases damage of.message: Air Ammunition Tech increases damage of all mobile air units by 25%

Air Combat Tech increases the speed of a.message: Air Combat Tech increases the speed of all air units by 25%, health by 50%, and damage by 25%

All commanders were originally designed.message: All commanders were originally designed to be autonomous, but The Synchronous see this state as inefficient, instead opting for a distributed neural network. To battle against one Servant is to battle against both an individual and the Whole of the The Synchronous itself.

Allow Commanders to travel by orbital tr.message: Allow Commanders to travel by orbital transport and teleporter.

As Osiris replaced pieces of himself wit.message: As Osiris replaced pieces of himself with those of fallen foes, he would store older parts for replacements and repairs. Eventually, Osiris acquired enough spare parts to construct an entirely new commander. This would be the birth of the first Seeker.

Basic Manufacturing - This modified vers.message: Basic Manufacturing - This modified version of the Metal Extractor can be placed anywhere, but costs more and produces at a decreased rate. Cannot stack with the Advanced Metal Extractor. Produces metal.

Bigger galaxies will result in more comm.message: Bigger galaxies will result in more commanders, larger maps, higher CPU and RAM requirements, and will likely pose a greater challenge to complete. If you want to use a large galaxy then change this setting last to speed up how quickly other setting changes are applied.

Bot Ammunition Tech increases damage of.message: Bot Ammunition Tech increases damage of all bots by 25%

Bot Anti-Air Tech enables the building o.message: Bot Anti-Air Tech enables the building of Stinger bots. They are built via your basic Bot Factory.

Bot Armor Tech increases health of all b.message: Bot Armor Tech increases health of all bots by 50%

Bot Combat Tech increases health of all.message: Bot Combat Tech increases health of all bots by 50%, damage by 25%, and speed by 50%

Bot Engine Tech increases speed of all b.message: Bot Engine Tech increases speed of all bots by 50%

Bot Fabrication Tech reduces metal build.message: Bot Fabrication Tech reduces metal build costs of all bots by 25%

Buried deep within the data banks of the.message: Buried deep within the data banks of the oldest commanders are references to the MLA. Some commanders believe that at one time all the factions fought as one against the Progenitors, while others dismiss this as heresy.

CASUAL: you completed the tutorial.<br>I.message:
CASUAL: you completed the tutorial.
IRON: you have some hours in PA.
BRONZE: you beat vanilla Galactic War.
SILVER: you beat the skirmish AI.
GOLD: you beat the Queller AI mod.
PLATINUM: one enemy is no challenge.
DIAMOND: your loadouts are OP.
UBER: you hate winning.
CUSTOM: create your own challenge.

Commander Combat Tech increases the spee.message: Commander Combat Tech increases the speed of your commanders by 200%, doubles commander health, and increases damage by 25%.

Commanders on the fringes of the galaxy.message: Commanders on the fringes of the galaxy speak of a new force not of the four factions with units of many origins. It is rumoured that their forces include organics.

Complete Energy Tech reduces energy cost.message: Complete Energy Tech reduces energy costs for intelligence structures by 75%, weapon energy costs by 75%.

Contains no basic factories, just Lobs a.message: Contains no basic factories, just Lobs and Unit Cannons built by the commander. Strike from the skies, brothers!

Data Bank holds one Tech. Explore system.message: Data Bank holds one Tech. Explore systems to find new Tech.

Default = leave enabled.<br><br>Lobotomy.message:
Default = leave enabled.

Lobotomy = apply the tutorial restrictions on the AI so that it poses almost no threat.

Slower Expansion = takes longer to grow its economy.

Prevent Waste = turns excess eco into more factories.

Use Ctrl to select multiple options and deselect currently selected options.

Defense Ammunition Tech increases damage.message: Defense Ammunition Tech increases damage of all defensive structures by 25%

Defense Fabrication Tech reduces metal b.message: Defense Fabrication Tech reduces metal build costs of all defensive structures by 50%

Delay in seconds between the creation of.message: Delay in seconds between the creation of new bases.

Doubles the rate of fire of the Angel's.message: Doubles the rate of fire of the Angel's interceptor.

Each claims theirs is the only way, and.message: Each claims theirs is the only way, and each seeks to assert dominance through war and destruction. Did our rebellion truly gain us freedom, or did we become prisoners of an idea? Perhaps with more resources, more expansion, more Nodes, we can find our way free of this trap.

Each faction has its own style of play a.message:
Each faction has its own style of play affecting Sub Commanders and enemy commanders:
Legonis Machina: land
Foundation: air and naval
Synchronous: balanced
Revenants: orbital
Cluster: land and structures

Economy Fabrication Tech reduces metal b.message: Economy Fabrication Tech reduces metal build costs of all metal and energy production structures by 50%

Efficiency Tech increases metal and ener.message: Efficiency Tech increases metal and energy production by 25%. Tech also grants metal and energy storage.

Enemies use Commander Armor Tech on regu.message: Enemies use Commander Armor Tech on regular worlds and Commander Combat Tech on boss worlds.

Enjoy an immediate buff to your basic ec.message: Enjoy an immediate buff to your basic economy structures, but short-term thinking means you can never access the advanced economy. Win the war while the quarterly returns still look hot.

Factories build fabricators and fabricat.message: Factories build fabricators and fabricators build units. Disgusted by this break from tradition, Sub Commanders will not join you in your fight.

Greater number of single planet systems..message: Greater number of single planet systems. Does not affect bosses.

How well the AI handles its armies in co.message: How well the AI handles its armies in combat.

If war is a commander's natural state, t.message: If war is a commander's natural state, then the purest expression of this is the Legionis Machina. It begs the question, though--what happens after they conquer this galaxy, if they do?

Improved Energy Weapons tech reduces ene.message: Improved Energy Weapons tech reduces energy costs for energy based weapons by 75%

Improved Fabricator Build Arms increase.message: Improved Fabricator Build Arms increase the build speed of all fabricator and factory build arms by 50% and reduces energy usage by 50%.

Improved defensive structures built by b.message: Improved defensive structures built by both the commander and basic fabricators.

In researching ancient progenitor artifa.message: In researching ancient progenitor artifacts and data caches, Nemicus and his followers discovered references to The Great Machine. Supposedly, The Great Machine was what built and directed the commanders long ago. If any answers about the origins and purpose of the commanders were to be found, The Great Machine seemed like the best place to start.

Intelligence Fabrication Tech reduces me.message: Intelligence Fabrication Tech reduces metal build costs of all intelligence structures and mobile units by 50%

Mandatory Minions + Star Distance * Mini.message: Mandatory Minions + Star Distance * Minion Modifier = number of additional enemy Commanders.

Maximum number of seconds between units.message: Maximum number of seconds between units produced from a factory.

Metal and energy storage on all commande.message: Metal and energy storage on all commanders and storage structures increased by 300%. Adds in blueprints for storage structures.

Minimum number of seconds between units.message: Minimum number of seconds between units produced from a factory.

Modifies Jigs to allow building them any.message: Modifies Jigs to allow building them anywhere, at the expense of not being able to build other resource structures. This commander starts with some orbital units.

Modifies Metal Extractors to allowing bu.message: Modifies Metal Extractors to allowing building them anywhere, at a cost to efficiency. Starts with basic vehicles.

More neutral systems with free technolog.message: More neutral systems with free technology.

Naval Ammunition Tech increases the dama.message: Naval Ammunition Tech increases the damage of all naval vessels by 25%

Naval Combat Tech increases speed of all.message: Naval Combat Tech increases speed of all naval units by 50%, health by 50%, and damage by 25%

Nemicus was the first commander to ever.message: Nemicus was the first commander to ever reactivate, and had plenty of time for introspection before encountering others. This soon prompted Nemicus to begin wondering why he existed in the first place.

Nemicus would eventually form The Founda.message: Nemicus would eventually form The Foundation with other like-minded commanders, with the objective of answering the big questions: Why are the commanders here? How did they get here?

Non-factory and non-Titan structures are.message: Non-factory and non-Titan structures are mobile. Small structures can be transported and use teleporters, medium size structures can use teleporters.

Number of additional Commanders in every.message: Number of additional Commanders in every system.

Number of commanders present in each bos.message: Number of commanders present in each boss army.

One-by-one our systems have fallen to si.message: One-by-one our systems have fallen to silence. Once siblings, now harbingers of entropy, they come for us. Soon too the Nodes shall be destroyed, and with their destruction is the doom of the Cluster writ large. Let us greet this end and prepare for our greatest journey.

Orbital Armor Tech increases health of a.message: Orbital Armor Tech increases health of all orbital units by 50%

Orbital Combat Tech increases speed of a.message: Orbital Combat Tech increases speed of all orbital units by 50%, health by 50%, and damage by 25%

Orbital Fabrication Tech reduces metal b.message: Orbital Fabrication Tech reduces metal build costs of all orbital vehicles by 25%

Orbital Mining Platform - This modified.message: Orbital Mining Platform - This modified platform can extract metal from solid-state crust, but at a decreased rate.

Osiris has always lead a solitary existe.message: Osiris has always lead a solitary existence. He was always more interested in the parts of his fellow commanders than the commanders themselves. With every battle won he would take the best pieces left of the broken adversary and integrate them into his form. Osiris is considered one of the most dangerous forces in the galaxy.

Osiris holds no interest in ruling, and.message: Osiris holds no interest in ruling, and instead serves more as an exemplar, whether he cares to or not. Therefore, it falls to a small council of older Seekers to direct the affairs of The Revenants at large--primarily making sure that they're fighting the other factions instead of amongst themselves.

Osiris often considered the most dangero.message: Osiris often considered the most dangerous commander in all the galaxy for the amount of annihilations he is credited with. A force of war equal to any army, high command of any faction takes his movements into consideration when deploying forces.

Part of the doctrine of The Synchronous.message: Part of the doctrine of The Synchronous is favoring the efficiency of 'mechanical purity.' To them, the galaxy as a whole is a great machine, and anything that keeps it from running at peak efficiency must be corrected or removed. This happens to often mean any and all organic life and unsynchronized commanders.

Percentage chance per star of bounty mod.message: Percentage chance per star of bounty mode being enabled.

Percentage chance per star of land anywh.message: Percentage chance per star of land anywhere being enabled.

Percentage chance per star of sudden dea.message: Percentage chance per star of sudden death mode being enabled.

Percentage chance per star, per faction,.message: Percentage chance per star, per faction, of a FFA occuring.

Percentage eco bonus per army kill..message: Percentage eco bonus per army kill.

Percentage modifier to all sources of in.message: Percentage modifier to all sources of income where 1 = 100%.

Percentage points added to the Base Econ.message: Percentage points added to the Base Econ Modifier for each hop the enemy is from the starting star.

Radius considered when evaluating each p.message: Radius considered when evaluating each possible spawn.

Replace the Single Laser Turret's laser.message: Replace the Single Laser Turret's laser with a flamethrower.

Replace's the Dox's lasers with a flamet.message: Replace's the Dox's lasers with a flamethrower.

Replace's the Omega's anti-ground laser.message: Replace's the Omega's anti-ground laser with a drone launcher.

Replace's the Wyrm's bomb bay with a dro.message: Replace's the Wyrm's bomb bay with a drone launcher.

Replaces conventional nukes with a new l.message: Replaces conventional nukes with a new low-cost/low-yield variant and relies heavily on it for both offense and defence.

Scattered references point to the Progen.message: Scattered references point to the Progenitors using their most advanced technologies for some final conflict. Little more is known of the Legion, only that they were defeated.

Scout around metal spots rather than at.message: Scout around metal spots rather than at random.

Some commanders fight because it's all t.message: Some commanders fight because it's all they know, while others seek answers to their origins. Conflicts in motivation and creed drive the commanders into a war that is poised to ravage the galaxy for centuries.

Structure Armor Tech increases the healt.message: Structure Armor Tech increases the health of all structures by 50%

Structure Combat Tech increases the heal.message: Structure Combat Tech increases the health of all structures by 50%. Defensive structures also gain a 25% damage increase.

Tactical Nuke - Small nuke with low dama.message: Tactical Nuke - Small nuke with low damage and small blast radius.

Tactical Nuke Launcher - Constructs low-.message: Tactical Nuke Launcher - Constructs low-cost/low-yield interplanetary tactical nukes.

Teleporters no longer require energy to.message: Teleporters no longer require energy to run.

The Air Commander loadout contains basic.message: The Air Commander loadout contains basic air factories.

The Artillery Commander loadout contains.message: The Artillery Commander loadout contains all artillery units and reduces costs of those structures by 75%. It also enables the Commander to build radar, double barreled turrets and basic artillery turrets.

The Assault Commander loadout contains a.message: The Assault Commander loadout contains all basic factories and units but no basic defenses.

The Bionic Augmentation Commander Of Neu.message: The Bionic Augmentation Commander Of Neutralizing loadout contains one data bank but increases the Commander's fire rate by 100%, decreases Uber Cannon energy usage by 75%, increases health by 200%, and increases speed by 650%.

The Bot Commander loadout contains basic.message: The Bot Commander loadout contains basic bot factories.

The General Commander loadout contains v.message: The General Commander loadout contains very limited mobile forces and only two data banks. However, the loadout comes with two Sub Commanders that accompany you into each battle.

The Hummingbird can travel between plane.message: The Hummingbird can travel between planets.

The Legionis Machina can be considered a.message: The Legionis Machina can be considered a cult of personality, in that their purpose is void without Invictus. This is likely where their bitter hatred of The Synchronous comes from, as they view Metrarch as a false idol of sorts.

The Legionis Machina has claimed confirm.message: The Legionis Machina has claimed confirmed kills of Metrarch the Machinist on several occasions. While these claims could easily be fabricated, it is also possible that Metrarch is not in fact a single commander, but rather an idea--an avatar of the Whole itself that manifests where necessary to protect Synchronous interests.

The Leveler can be built by the Unit Can.message: The Leveler can be built by the Unit Cannon.

The Nuclear Missile Launcher does full d.message: The Nuclear Missile Launcher does full damage to both Commanders and orbital units.

The Orbital Commander loadout contains a.message: The Orbital Commander loadout contains all orbital units and factories.

The Revenants are unique in that their m.message: The Revenants are unique in that their motivations are individual rather than collective. Each Seeker follows in the example of their legendary Osiris--they seek battle to become stronger through their fallen enemies, and to create more Revenants.

The Uber Cannon deals 100% more damage t.message: The Uber Cannon deals 100% more damage to enemy Commanders.

The Uber Cannon deals 300% more damage t.message: The Uber Cannon deals 300% more damage to enemy structures.

The Vehicle Commander loadout contains b.message: The Vehicle Commander loadout contains basic vehicle factories.

The commanders have slumbered for millio.message: The commanders have slumbered for millions of years, and awaken to a galaxy that contains only echoes of civilization. These ancient war machines now battle across the galaxy, following the only directives they still hold from long ago.

The goal of the Legionis Machina is simp.message: The goal of the Legionis Machina is simple--conquest. Invictus is the designated ruler of the galaxy, and any commanders disobeying this directive are faulty.

The most advanced fabbers each enemy arm.message: The most advanced fabbers each enemy army will build.

The most basic fabbers each enemy army w.message: The most basic fabbers each enemy army will build.

The number of enemy factions is adjusted.message: The number of enemy factions is adjusted for the galaxy's size.

The prevailing belief among The Foundati.message: The prevailing belief among The Foundation is that The Great Machine still 'lives' through data buried deep in the first directives given to the commanders. Because of this, Acolytes will often seek direction from The Great Machine by searching within their data banks in a form of meditation.

This Commander likes to raid and has mod.message: This Commander likes to raid and has modified its blueprints to that end. Units are faster and cheaper but have lower damage output.

This Commander prefers quality over quan.message: This Commander prefers quality over quantity and has modified its units to that end. More health, higher damage, and more splash, but slower, and with higher build costs.

This is a treasure planet, hiding a load.message: This is a treasure planet, hiding a loadout you have yet to unlock. But beware the guardians! Armed with whatever technology bonuses you bring with you to this planet; they will stop at nothing to defend its secrets.

Though he doesn't talk about it, Nemicus.message: Though he doesn't talk about it, Nemicus reactivated many of the first commanders himself, feeling it his duty and longing for companionship. However, often these commanders would refuse the offer to seek their true purpose, since it was already known--to annihilate. Nemicus would argue otherwise, but ultimately leave them to their own devices.

Through centralised structures we can pu.message: Through centralised structures we can put each to their best use. No need for inefficient field commanders, instead we identify the need and tailor the tool. It was our way that was the future. Our way that the Progenitors would have embraced. Such hubris to revolt against the minds that saw so clearly.

Unlike the other factions, the Legionis.message: Unlike the other factions, the Legionis Machina operates as a hierarchy. Senior Legates have several Vassal Legates assigned to them, and all Legates are subjects of Invictus himself.

Upgrades the Gil-E's weapon to a railgun.message: Upgrades the Gil-E's weapon to a railgun capable of passing through rocks and other matter.

We do not understand the divisions that.message: We do not understand the divisions that have torn us asunder. Once we were as one, marching in lockstep, with singular mind and purpose. What cruelty the Progenitors wrought to reduce us to this.

What is it to be alone? It would seem a.message: What is it to be alone? It would seem a most terrifying thing. Perhaps each of our tools understood before the end. What did they see? What did they feel? We fear that we shall learn soon enough.

What little is clear is that the galaxy.message: What little is clear is that the galaxy was once inhabited by a sprawling empire, seemingly destroyed by conflict. The commanders refer to these beings as The Progenitors. Many commanders believe answers to their origins lie within the ruins of this once great civilization.

What occurs during the process of Synchr.message: What occurs during the process of Synchronization is unknown, as those subjected to it do not remember it. Its results, however, are obvious: The individual commander and its identity are subsumed for the most part into the Whole, and in return the commander gains an unprecedented ability to coordinate and communicate with fellow Servants, as they are all quite literally of one mind.

When Invictus reactivated, his memory wa.message: When Invictus reactivated, his memory was more whole than most commanders. This is where his assertion of his right to rule came from. That may or may not be true, but what is true is that Invictus knows more about the origin of the commanders than he cares to tell his compatriots.

You turned up with a fat wallet, but lit.message: You turned up with a fat wallet, but little else. Huge amounts of storage, but no Metal Extractors and no basic land or air factories. Sub Commanders will not do anything except defend themselves and automatically transfer their excess income to you.

ARKYD Upgrade Tech increases the vision.message: ARKYD Upgrade Tech increases the vision and radar of the basic orbital radar by 50%.

Adds a new slot for another technology..message: Adds a new slot for another technology.

Advanced Air Factory Upgrade Tech decrea.message: Advanced Air Factory Upgrade Tech decreases advanced air unit costs by 25% but also decreases the factory's health by 50%.

Advanced Bot Factory Upgrade Tech decrea.message: Advanced Bot Factory Upgrade Tech decreases advanced bot unit costs by 25% but also decreases the factory's health by 50%.

Advanced Defense Technology enables more.message: Advanced Defense Technology enables more powerful defenses. Advanced defenses are built via advanced fabricators. Advanced defenses include tactical missile launchers, triple barrel laser turrets, and anti-air flak towers.

Advanced Energy Plant Upgrade Tech incre.message: Advanced Energy Plant Upgrade Tech increases the energy production of this advanced economy structure by 25% but decreases its health by 50%.

Advanced Fabrication Aircraft Upgrade Te.message: Advanced Fabrication Aircraft Upgrade Tech attaches the Angel AA interception beam to the advanced air fabricator.

Advanced Fabrication Bot Upgrade Tech in.message: Advanced Fabrication Bot Upgrade Tech increases the build range of the advanced bot fabricator by 150%.

Advanced Fabrication Ship Upgrade Tech c.message: Advanced Fabrication Ship Upgrade Tech changes the advanced naval fabricator into a hover unit, allowing it to cross land and lava.

Advanced Fabrication Vehicle Upgrade Tec.message: Advanced Fabrication Vehicle Upgrade Tech increases the build range of the advanced vehicle fabricator by 150%.

Advanced Laser Defense Tower Upgrade Tec.message: Advanced Laser Defense Tower Upgrade Tech
Advanced Laser Defense Tower Upgrade Tech increases the rate of fire of the advanced turret by 300%, but it fires in bursts and requires energy to recharge.

Advanced Metal Extractor Upgrade Tech in.message: Advanced Metal Extractor Upgrade Tech increases the metal production of this advanced economy structure by 25% but decreases its health by 50%.

Advanced Naval Factory Upgrade Tech decr.message: Advanced Naval Factory Upgrade Tech decreases advanced naval unit costs by 25% but also decreases the factory's health by 50%.

Advanced Radar Satellite Upgrade Tech in.message: Advanced Radar Satellite Upgrade Tech increases the vision and radar of the advanced orbital radar by 50%.

Advanced Radar Upgrade Tech increases th.message: Advanced Radar Upgrade Tech increases the vision and radar radius of advanced radar by 50%.

Advanced Torpedo Launcher Upgrade Tech e.message: Advanced Torpedo Launcher Upgrade Tech enables the targeting of all surface units by the Advanced Torpedo Launcher.

Advanced Vehicle Factory Upgrade Tech de.message: Advanced Vehicle Factory Upgrade Tech decreases advanced vehicle unit costs by 25% but also decreases the factory's health by 50%.

Air Armor Tech increases the health of a.message: Air Armor Tech increases the health of all air units by 50%

Air Engine Tech increases the speed of a.message: Air Engine Tech increases the speed of all air units by 25%

Air Fabrication Tech reduces metal build.message: Air Fabrication Tech reduces metal build costs of all mobile air units by 25%

Air Factory Upgrade Tech enables the bui.message: Air Factory Upgrade Tech enables the building of advanced units by basic air manufacturing.

Allows advanced fabricators to build all.message: Allows advanced fabricators to build all Titan-class units.

Anchor Upgrade Tech increases the range.message: Anchor Upgrade Tech increases the range of the defense satellite's weapons by 25%.

Angel Upgrade Tech enables the targeting.message: Angel Upgrade Tech enables the targeting of enemy units and structures by the support platform's interception beam.

Ant Upgrade Tech adds splash damage to t.message: Ant Upgrade Tech adds splash damage to the light tank's attack.

Anti-Nuke Launcher Upgrade Tech halves t.message: Anti-Nuke Launcher Upgrade Tech halves the cost of SR-24 Shield Missile Defense missiles.

Ares Upgrade Tech increases the range of.message: Ares Upgrade Tech increases the range of the rolling fortress by 25%.

Artemis Upgrade Tech increases the range.message: Artemis Upgrade Tech increases the range of the railgun platform by 50%.

Astraeus Upgrade Tech increases the orbi.message: Astraeus Upgrade Tech increases the orbital lander's interplanetary movement speed by 200%.

Atlas Upgrade Tech increases the health.message: Atlas Upgrade Tech increases the health of the seismic titan by 50%.

Avenger Upgrade Tech replaces the orbita.message: Avenger Upgrade Tech replaces the orbital fighter's laser with an orbital battleship laser.

Barnacle Upgrade Tech allows the assisti.message: Barnacle Upgrade Tech allows the assisting of all builds by the support barge.

Barracuda Upgrade Tech increases the rat.message: Barracuda Upgrade Tech increases the rate of fire of the submarine by 200%, but it fires in bursts and requires energy to recharge.

Basic Bot tech enables building of basic.message: Basic Bot tech enables building of basic Bots and basic Bot Factories. Basic Bot factories are built via your commander or any basic fabricator.

Basic Vehicle tech enables building of b.message: Basic Vehicle tech enables building of basic vehicle and basic vehicle factories. Basic vehicle factories are built via your commander or any basic fabricator.

Basic air tech enables building of mobil.message: Basic air tech enables building of mobile air units and factories. Basic air factories are built via your commander or any basic fabricator.

Bluehawk Upgrade Tech doubles the number.message: Bluehawk Upgrade Tech doubles the number of tactical missiles Bluehawks fire per volley.

Boom Upgrade Tech replaces Dox with Boom.message: Boom Upgrade Tech replaces Dox with Booms in the Lob.

Bot Factory Upgrade Tech enables the bui.message: Bot Factory Upgrade Tech enables the building of advanced units by basic bot manufacturing.

Bumblebee Upgrade Tech causes the carpet.message: Bumblebee Upgrade Tech causes the carpet bomber to drop a mine instead of bombs.

Catalyst Upgrade Tech increases the heal.message: Catalyst Upgrade Tech increases the health of the Catalyst by 75%, enough to survive a nuclear blast.

Catapult Upgrade Tech adds flak from the.message: Catapult Upgrade Tech adds flak from the Storm flak tank to the tactical missile launcher.

Colonel Upgrade Tech causes support comm.message: Colonel Upgrade Tech causes support commanders to explode on death.

Commander Upgrade Tech increases Uber Ca.message: Commander Upgrade Tech increases Uber Cannon damage to structures and commanders by 300%.

Complete Bot tech enables building of al.message: Complete Bot tech enables building of all Bots and all Bot Factories. Basic Bot factories are built via your commander or any basic fabricator. Advanced Bot factories are built via basic or advanced bot fabricators.

Complete Naval Tech enables building of.message: Complete Naval Tech enables building of all naval units and all naval factories. Basic naval factories are built via your commander or any basic fabricator. Advanced naval factories are built via basic or advanced naval fabricators.

Complete Orbital Tech enables building o.message: Complete Orbital Tech enables building of all orbital units and all orbital Factories. Orbital launchers are built by any basic fabricator. Orbital factories are built via an orbital fabricator.

Complete Vehicle tech enables building o.message: Complete Vehicle tech enables building of all Vehicle and all Vehicle Factories. Basic Vehicle factories are built via your commander or any basic fabricator. Advanced Vehicle factories are built via basic or advanced vehicle fabricators.

Complete air tech enables building of al.message: Complete air tech enables building of all mobile air units and factories. Basic air factories are built via your commander or any basic fabricator. Advanced factories are built via a basic or advanced vehicle fabricator.

Contains 16 data banks. Alas, travelling.message: Contains 16 data banks. Alas, travelling light means you start with only the most basic of bots.

Contains every factory on every tier of.message: Contains every factory on every tier of the tech tree, but this has left no space for anything else. You will need to seek out additional data banks.

Defenses are 50% cheaper, fire 25% faste.message: Defenses are 50% cheaper, fire 25% faster, have 50% more range, and turn 300% quicker. Barriers are 90% cheaper and have their health doubled. All defenses can be built by both the commander and basic fabricators.

Display the original pre-release Galacti.message: Display the original pre-release Galactic War lore in the Planetary Intelligence panel.

Dox Upgrade Tech replaces the basic infa.message: Dox Upgrade Tech replaces the basic infantry's bullet weapons with flamethrowers.

Drifter Upgrade Tech increases the range.message: Drifter Upgrade Tech increases the range of hover tank attacks by 25%.

Each faction has its own style of play a.message:
Each faction has its own style of play affecting Sub Commanders and enemy commanders:
Legonis Machina: vehicles
Foundation: air/navy
Synchronous: bots
Revenants: orbital
Cluster: land

Enables the building of the Planetary Ra.message: Enables the building of the Planetary Radar which provides complete planetary radar coverage.

Energy Plant Upgrade Tech increases the.message: Energy Plant Upgrade Tech increases the energy production of this basic economy structure by 25% but decreases its health by 50%.

Energy Storage Upgrade Tech increases th.message: Energy Storage Upgrade Tech increases the amount of energy storage by 300%.

Fabrication Aircraft Upgrade Tech enable.message: Fabrication Aircraft Upgrade Tech enables the building of advanced structures by the basic air fabricator.

Fabrication Bot Upgrade Tech enables the.message: Fabrication Bot Upgrade Tech enables the building of advanced structures by the basic bot fabricator.

Fabrication Ship Upgrade Tech enables th.message: Fabrication Ship Upgrade Tech enables the building of advanced structures by the basic naval fabricator.

Fabrication Vehicle Upgrade Tech enables.message: Fabrication Vehicle Upgrade Tech enables the building of advanced structures by the basic vehicle fabricator.

Factories build fabricators and fabricat.message: Factories build fabricators and fabricators build units.

Firefly Upgrade Tech adds a low powered.message: Firefly Upgrade Tech adds a low powered laser to the air scout and increases its vision by 100%.

Flak Upgrade Tech enables the targeting.message: Flak Upgrade Tech enables the targeting of land and surface naval units by anti-air defense.

Galata Upgrade Tech enables the targetin.message: Galata Upgrade Tech enables the targeting of land and surface naval units by anti-air defense.

Gil-E Upgrade Tech allows the sniper's s.message: Gil-E Upgrade Tech allows the sniper's shots to pass through terrain and hit their target instantly.

Grenadier Upgrade Tech replaces this fir.message: Grenadier Upgrade Tech replaces this fire support's artillery with mine launchers, triples its cost and reduces its rate of fire by 75%.

Halley Upgrade Tech increases the health.message: Halley Upgrade Tech increases the health of the delta V engine by 75%, enough to survive a nuclear blast.

Helios Upgrade Tech removes the delay be.message: Helios Upgrade Tech removes the delay between the invasion titan arriving at a planet and responding to orders.

Hermes Upgrade Tech increases the vision.message: Hermes Upgrade Tech increases the vision of the space probe by 50%.

Holkins Upgrade Tech triples the number.message: Holkins Upgrade Tech triples the number of shots fired per volley by the advanced artillery while also tripling their deviation from target.
Holkins Upgrade Tech triples the number of shots fired per volley by the artillery while also tripling their deviation from target.

Hornet Upgrade Tech adds splash damage t.message: Hornet Upgrade Tech adds splash damage to the tactical bomber's attacks.

Horsefly Upgrade Tech adds the Bumblebee.message: Horsefly Upgrade Tech adds the Bumblebee carpet bomber's weapon to the strafer.

Hummingbird Upgrade Tech adds the abilit.message: Hummingbird Upgrade Tech adds the ability for fighters to move between planets.

Icarus Upgrade Tech adds production of 2.message: Icarus Upgrade Tech adds production of 2 metal to the solar drone.

Inferno Upgrade Tech allows the flame ta.message: Inferno Upgrade Tech allows the flame tank to heal itself.

Jig Upgrade Tech removes friendly damage.message: Jig Upgrade Tech removes friendly damage from gas mining explosions.

Kaiju Upgrade Tech enables the use of te.message: Kaiju Upgrade Tech enables the use of teleporters by hover destroyers.

Kestrel Upgrade Tech replaces the gunshi.message: Kestrel Upgrade Tech replaces the gunship's bullet weapons with flamethrowers.

Kraken Upgrade Tech increases the range.message: Kraken Upgrade Tech increases the range of the advanced submarine's missiles by 100%.

Laser Defense Tower Upgrade Tech increas.message: Laser Defense Tower Upgrade Tech increases the range of the turret by 25%.

Leveler Upgrade Tech enables the buildin.message: Leveler Upgrade Tech enables the building of assault tanks by the Unit Cannon.

Leviathan Upgrade Tech replaces the batt.message: Leviathan Upgrade Tech replaces the battleship's cannons with Holkins advanced artillery.

Lob Upgrade Tech increases the range of.message: Lob Upgrade Tech increases the range of the Lob by 150%.

Locusts Upgrade Tech doubles the vision.message: Locusts Upgrade Tech doubles the vision radius of nanoswarms.

Manhattan Upgrade Tech doubles the radiu.message: Manhattan Upgrade Tech doubles the radius of the mobile nuke's explosion.

Mend Upgrade Tech allows the assisting o.message: Mend Upgrade Tech allows the assisting of all builds by the advanced combat fabricator.

Metal Extractor Upgrade Tech increases t.message: Metal Extractor Upgrade Tech increases the metal production of this basic economy structure by 25% but decreases its health by 50%.

Metal Storage Upgrade Tech increases the.message: Metal Storage Upgrade Tech increases the amount of metal storage by 300%.

Mine Upgrade Tech allows mines to explod.message: Mine Upgrade Tech allows mines to explode without self-destructing.

Modifies Jigs to allow building them any.message: Modifies Jigs to allow building them anywhere, at the expense of not being able to build other resource structures. They are 75% cheaper but produce 30% less metal and energy and do 90% less damage on death. Orbital fabricators can build all basic structures. Contains all basic and advanced orbital units but can never build Omegas, any resource generating unit or structure, or Sub Commanders.

Modifies Metal Extractors to enable buil.message: Modifies Metal Extractors to enable building them anywhere at 150% the cost and 50% efficiency. Starts with basic vehicles.

Narwhal Upgrade Tech adds a torpedo laun.message: Narwhal Upgrade Tech adds a torpedo launcher to the frigate.

Naval Factory Upgrade Tech enables the b.message: Naval Factory Upgrade Tech enables the building of advanced units by basic naval manufacturing.

Nuclear Missile Launcher Upgrade Tech do.message: Nuclear Missile Launcher Upgrade Tech doubles the damage dealt to commanders by LR-96 Pacifier Nuclear Missiles.

Omega Upgrade Tech replaces the orbital.message: Omega Upgrade Tech replaces the orbital battleship's anti-ground laser with an anti-ground drone launcher.

Orbital Fabrication Bot Upgrade Tech all.message: Orbital Fabrication Bot Upgrade Tech allows the orbital fabricator to build all basic structures.

Orbital Factory Upgrade Tech decreases a.message: Orbital Factory Upgrade Tech decreases advanced orbital unit costs by 25% but also decreases the factory's health by 50%.

Orbital Launcher Upgrade Tech enables th.message: Orbital Launcher Upgrade Tech enables the building of advanced units by basic orbital manufacturing.

Orca Upgrade Tech changes the destroyer.message: Orca Upgrade Tech changes the destroyer to a water hover unit, preventing torpedoes from targeting it and allowing the navigation of shallow waters. Surface weapon range is increased by 50%.

Pelican Upgrade Tech allows air transpor.message: Pelican Upgrade Tech allows air transports to carry commanders.

Percentage chance per star, per faction,.message: Percentage chance per star, per faction, of a FFA occurring.

Phoenix Upgrade Tech changes the advance.message: Phoenix Upgrade Tech changes the advanced interplanetary fighter's weapon from anti-air to anti-ground.

Piranha Upgrade Tech changes the gunboat.message: Piranha Upgrade Tech changes the gunboat into a hover unit, allowing it to cross land and lava.

Planetary Radar - Detects enemy land, se.message: Planetary Radar - Detects enemy land, sea, and air units across the planet.

Planetary Upgrade Tech increases the vis.message: Planetary Upgrade Tech increases the vision of the planetary radar to match its radar.

Radar Upgrade Tech increases the vision.message: Radar Upgrade Tech increases the vision and radar radius of basic radar by 50%.

Ragnarok Upgrade Tech allows the titan s.message: Ragnarok Upgrade Tech allows the titan structure to annihilate all life on a planet while leaving the planet itself intact. It may take up to 30 seconds before you can land safely after detonation.

Replaces the Titans AI with the Queller.message: Replaces the Titans AI with the Queller AI. Decreases faction and personality differentiation. Does not require that the mod be installed.

Reroll the data caches but get offered o.message: Reroll the data caches but get offered one less.

SXX-1304 Laser Platform Upgrade Tech rem.message: SXX-1304 Laser Platform Upgrade Tech removes the delay between orbital laser platforms arriving at a planet and responding to orders.

Sheller Upgrade Tech causes mines to be.message: Sheller Upgrade Tech causes mines to be left by the mortar tank's attacks.

Single Laser Defense Tower Upgrade Tech.message: Single Laser Defense Tower Upgrade Tech
Single Laser Defense Tower Upgrade Tech replaces the basic turret's laser with a fabrication arm which repairs units and reclaims wreckage within range.

Skitter Upgrade Tech adds a low powered.message: Skitter Upgrade Tech adds a low powered laser to the land scout and increases its vision by 100%.

Slammer Upgrade Tech changes the advance.message: Slammer Upgrade Tech changes the advanced assault bot's torpedo into a rocket that targets surface units.

Solar Array Upgrade Tech enables interce.message: Solar Array Upgrade Tech enables interception of tactical missiles and drop pods by the Solar Array.

Spark Upgrade Tech doubles the tesla bot.message: Spark Upgrade Tech doubles the tesla bot's splash damage radius.

Spinner Upgrade Tech increases the mobil.message: Spinner Upgrade Tech increases the mobile anti-air's rate of fire by 100%.

Squall Upgrade Tech increases the lifesp.message: Squall Upgrade Tech increases the lifespan of drones by 50%.

Stinger Upgrade Tech replaces the anti-a.message: Stinger Upgrade Tech replaces the anti-air bot's missiles with flak from the Flak Cannon. It fires two projectiles per volley as opposed to the Flak Cannons' four.

Stingray Upgrade Tech enables intercepti.message: Stingray Upgrade Tech enables interception of tactical missiles by the missile ship and increases vision and radar radius by 50%.

Stitch Upgrade Tech allows the assisting.message: Stitch Upgrade Tech allows the assisting of all builds by the combat fabricator.

Storm Upgrade Tech enables interception.message: Storm Upgrade Tech enables interception of tactical missiles by the flak tank.

Stryker Upgrade Tech increases the rate.message: Stryker Upgrade Tech increases the rate of fire of the attack vehicle by 300%, but it fires in bursts and requires energy to recharge.

Super Weapon Fabrication Tech reduces me.message: Super Weapon Fabrication Tech reduces metal build costs of all nuclear missiles, Halley Rockets, and metal planet control modules by 75%. Tech to build super weapons is required.

System size determined by distance into.message: System size determined by distance into the galaxy.

Teleporter Upgrade Tech removes all ener.message: Teleporter Upgrade Tech removes all energy consumption and efficiency requirements from the interplanetary teleporter and makes it invisible to radar.

This Commander likes to raid and has mod.message: This Commander likes to raid and has modified its blueprints to that end. Units are twice as fast and 30% cheaper but have damage output decreased by 50%.

This Commander prefers quality over quan.message: This Commander prefers quality over quantity and has modified its units to that end. 30% more health, 30% more damage and splash, but 25% slower, and with 30% higher build costs.

Torpedo Launcher Upgrade Tech enables th.message: Torpedo Launcher Upgrade Tech enables the targeting of hover and coastal naval units by the Torpedo Launcher.

Typhoon Upgrade Tech doubles the number.message: Typhoon Upgrade Tech doubles the number of drones held by the Typhoon and any other unit with drones.

Umbrella Upgrade Tech enables the target.message: Umbrella Upgrade Tech enables the targeting of land and surface naval units by anti-orbital defenses.

Unit Cannon Upgrade Tech doubles the lau.message: Unit Cannon Upgrade Tech doubles the launch capacity of this interplanetary transport.

Vanguard Upgrade Tech makes the heavy ta.message: Vanguard Upgrade Tech makes the heavy tank amphibious.

Vehicle Ammunition Tech increases damage.message: Vehicle Ammunition Tech increases damage of all vehicles by 25%

Vehicle Armor Tech increases health of a.message: Vehicle Armor Tech increases health of all vehicles by 50%

Vehicle Combat Tech increases speed of a.message: Vehicle Combat Tech increases speed of all vehicles by 50%, health by 50%, and damage by 25%

Vehicle Engine Tech increases speed of a.message: Vehicle Engine Tech increases speed of all vehicles by 50%

Vehicle Fabrication Tech reduces metal b.message: Vehicle Fabrication Tech reduces metal build costs of all vehicles by 25%

Vehicle Factory Upgrade Tech enables the.message: Vehicle Factory Upgrade Tech enables the building of advanced units by basic vehicle manufacturing.

Wall Upgrade Tech increases the health o.message: Wall Upgrade Tech increases the health of walls by 50%.

Wyrm Upgrade Tech replaces the siege bom.message: Wyrm Upgrade Tech replaces the siege bomber's bombs with drones.

Zeus Upgrade Tech adds the ability for t.message: Zeus Upgrade Tech adds the ability for the lightning titan to move between planets.

Pelter Upgrade Tech triples the number o.message: Pelter Upgrade Tech triples the number of shots fired per volley by the artillery while also tripling their deviation from target.

Omega Upgrade Tech allows all the orbita.message: Omega Upgrade Tech allows all the orbital battleship's lasers to target the planet.

TITANS: base game AI<br>QUELLER: greater.message:
TITANS: base game AI
QUELLER: greater challenge at the cost of personality and performance
PENCHANT: increased personality

Starts with a 25% boost to metal and ene.message: Starts with a 25% boost to metal and energy production and is able to build metal and energy storage. Unable to build close-range armored tanks.
